scripts.build: npm run build -w @window-codex/sdk && npm run build -w @window-codex/native-host && npm run build -w create-window-codex && npm run build -w @window-codex/docs && npm run build -w @window-codex/reflex && npm run build -w @window-codex/extension
scripts.test:prepare: npm run build -w @window-codex/sdk && npm run build -w @window-codex/native-host && npm run build -w create-window-codex
scripts.test: npm run test:prepare && npm run test --workspaces --if-present && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.deploy:docs: npm run build -w @window-codex/docs && wrangler pages deploy apps/docs/dist --project-name window-codex-docs
scripts.deploy:reflex: npm run build -w @window-codex/reflex && wrangler pages deploy apps/reflex/dist --project-name window-codex-reflex
